headline: NY Bitcoin Lawsuit Faces Dismissal Over 39,069 Wallets

article.title: Digital Chamber amicus brief urges dismissal of NY lawsuit over 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
article.summary: The Digital Chamber filed an amicus brief urging the dismissal of the New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, arguing it would set a dangerous precedent for self-custodial wallets.

article.title: MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins grew 128% before MiCA transition ended, says Decta
article.summary: Decta's report said the market cap of eight MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins rose to $673.9 million in the year before Europe’s CASP transition period ended.

headline: SpaceX valuation soars $150B on Wall Street bets

article.title: Wall Street Buys Into Musk’s SpaceX Vision
article.summary: SpaceX is joining the Nasdaq 100 Index and analysts at big global brokers are recommending investors buy shares.

headline: Copper Stocks Plunge 15% Amid AI Demand Surge

article.title: A Once-Great Copper Miner Faces a Reckoning Just as AI Power Demand Soars
article.summary: Chile’s Codelco, facing scrutiny for a fatal accident and inflated production figures, is struggling under $25 billion of debt.

headline: ABTC Drives US Treasury Holdings Past 8,000 BTC

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC

headline: USDT Flows Back to Bitcoin via Lightning Networks

article.title: USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
After years of development, UTEXO—backed by Tether—rolls out Bitcoin-native USDT with client-side validation, slashing fees and middlemen compared to Tron or Ethereum rails.

headline: China Regulatory Crackdown Hits $500B AI Sector

article.title: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
article.summary: Beijing's first rules targeting emotional AI are forcing the country's biggest apps to shut down custom agents.

headline: AI Threatens $1Tr Crypto Market Collapse Imminently

article.title: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
article.summary: Yvette Cooper said governments must agree on AI safeguards before frontier systems transform warfare, crime, and society.

article.title: Galaxy delivers 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave as Helios bitcoin mine turns AI hub
article.summary: Galaxy delivered 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave at its Helios campus, completing Phase I of the West Texas site's AI conversion.

headline: Tether Stake Sale: $1B on the Block

article.title: Tether’s former CIO seeks buyers for part of his stake in the firm: Bloomberg
article.summary: Former Tether CIO Richard Heathcote is seeking buyers for part of his 1.26% stake in the firm, according to Bloomberg.

article.summary: Dynacom Tankers, Stealth Maritime and Onassis Group boost revenues from transporting Russian fuel under G7 price cap regime
